name: Tracker
visual_summary: The Tracker component is a container for tracking small units of information that hover when clicked, revealing a tooltip with an additional line of text. Use this component when you have a small piece of data that's worth displaying in a compact format with a clear call-to-action.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: Tracker
Description: The Tracker component is a container for tracking small units of information that hover when clicked, revealing a tooltip with an additional line of text. Use this component when you have a small piece of data that's worth displaying in a compact format with a clear call-to-action.
Style: dark, minimal
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: tooltip, hover, compact, container, data

- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
